module:
Paragraph-based chunking strategy.

This module provides a chunking strategy that respects paragraph
boundaries while still adhering to token limits.

ParagraphChunkingStrategy.docstring:
Strategy that chunks text based on paragraph boundaries.
    
    This strategy attempts to keep paragraphs together when possible,
    only splitting paragraphs when they exceed the token limit.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the paragraph chunking strategy.
        
        Args:
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk
            **kwargs: Additional configuration options

chunk_text.docstring:
Divide text into chunks that respect paragraph boundaries.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to chunk
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (overrides instance setting)
            
        Returns:
            List of chunk dictionaries
